changes: Fetter Ward: Recast time has been reduced from 150 to 120 seconds.
Enhanced Fetter Ward recast time reduction enhancement has been changed from 120 to 90 seconds.
Glory Slash: 10y knockback effect has been added.
Axe Kick: Potency has been increased from 160 to 170.
Enhanced Axe Kick II: Potency increase has been changed from 190 to 200.
Somersault: Potency has been increased from 160 to 180.
Somersault: Spell speed reduction additional effect duration has been increased from 10 to 12 seconds.
Somersault: Now grants the effect of Perfect Balance for 3 seconds.
Enhanced Somersault II: Now also extends the duration of Perfect Balance to 6 seconds.
Impulse Rush: Potency has been increased from 200 to 240.
Skewer: Potency has been increased from 180 to 220.
Blast Shot: Range has been reduced from 25y to 5y.
Aetherflow: Skills such as One Ilm Punch or Glory Slash can now remove any remaining stacks of Aetherflow on a selected target.
Fetter Ward: Recast time reduced from 150 to 120 seconds.
Enhanced Fetter Ward: Recast time reduction enhancement changed from 120 to 90 seconds.
Glory Slash: 10y knockback effect added.
Axe Kick: Potency increased from 160 to 170.
Enhanced Axe Kick II: Potency increase changed from 190 to 200.
Somersault: Potency increased from 160 to 180.
Somersault: Spell speed reduction additional effect duration increased from 10 to 12 seconds.
Somersault: Now grants the effect of Perfect Balance for 3 seconds.
Enhanced Somersault II: Now also extends the duration of Perfect Balance to 6 seconds.
Impulse Rush: Potency increased from 200 to 240.
Skewer: Potency increased from 180 to 220.
Blast Shot: Range reduced from 25y to 5y.
Lethargy: Effect duration reduced from 12 to 6 seconds (PvP only).
Freeze: Additional effect duration reduced from 15 to 12 seconds (PvP only).
Aetherflow: Skills such as One Ilm Punch or Glory Slash can now remove any remaining stacks of Aetherflow on a selected target.

new_content.name: Ixal beast tribe quests
new_content.description: Daily quests where players craft items to build the airship Dezul Qualan.

new_content.name: Allied beast tribe quests
new_content.description: End-game quests available to players who have completed all available main quests for each beast tribe.
new_content.location: Various (Limsa Lominsa, New Gridania, Ul'dah, East Shroud, Western La Noscea, Outer La Noscea, North Shroud, Southern Thanalan)

new_content.name: Chocobo plumage coloring
new_content.description: System allowing players to change the feather color of stabled chocobos by feeding them specific fruits.

new_content.name: Skywatcher
new_content.description: New NPCs that provide current weather conditions and forecasts for all regions.
new_content.location: Limsa Lominsa Lower Decks, New Gridania, Ul'dah – Steps of Nald, Coerthas – Camp Dragonhead, Mor Dhona – Revenant's Toll

new_content.name: Alliance formation for duties
new_content.description: Allows players to form an alliance of 24 members prior to registering for Labyrinth of the Ancients or Syrcus Tower.

new_content.name: Private chambers / Free company housing updates
new_content.description: Updates to housing systems, including discharging members with chambers and new gardening items.

housing.name: Ixali Shelter
housing.description: A small and cozy shelter of Ixali design.

housing.name: Ixali Banner
housing.description: The mere sight of this banner instills any Ixal with courage.

glamour.name: Ehcatl Wristgloves
glamour.description: Hands. Must be equipped to craft certain Ixali recipes.
